message: 🌱 Add flux: Flux CLI unable to retrieve image ressource when image CRD mission (#615)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-3973-flux-cli-unable-to-retrieve-image-ressource-when-image-crd-is-not-inst",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: Flux CLI unable to retrieve image ressource when image CRD is not installed",
+    "description": "Flux CLI unable to retrieve image ressource when image CRD is not installed. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify flux troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your flux deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\n### Describe the bug\n\nHi !\n\nWhen I list all resources of flux using `flux get all`, got this error message:\n```bash\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: image.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Flux CLI unable to retrieve image ressource when image CRD",
+        "description": "Whenever an API type is not available then both, `flux get all` and `flux get image all` will just skip over that type instead of logging an error message.\n\nBefore:\n\n```\n$ flux get all\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs:\n```yaml\n$ flux get all\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: source.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n[...]\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: image.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: image.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n[...]\n$ echo $?\n0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Flux CLI unable to retrieve image ressource when is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Whenever an API type is not available then both, `flux get all` and `flux get image all` will just skip over that type instead of logging an error message.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ flux get all\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: source.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n[...]\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: image.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n✗ failed to get API group resources: unable to retrieve the complete list of server APIs: image.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1beta2: the server could not find the requested resource\n[...]\n$ echo $?\n0",
+        "$ flux get all\n$ echo $?\n0"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/3973",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/pull/4002"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 1,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:18:12.203Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
